lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor paint chips. The interior shows light signs of use. All mechanical systems are functioning properly.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and minor dents. The interior shows wear on the upholstery and floor mats. The engine and transmission are functional, though the vehicle may require some mechanical maintenance in the near future.

This vehicle is in absolute mint, showroom-quality condition. The exterior paint is flawless, displaying a deep, mirror-like luster with no chips, scratches, or imperfections of any kind. The interior is equally pristine, with the leather and trim appearing brand new and showing zero signs of wear. Mechanically, the car is perfect, having been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage. This is a rare, factory-fresh example that will satisfy the most discerning collector.

Get ready to hit the road in style! This vehicle is in truly good condition and has been well-cared for. It runs smoothly and looks great, showing only the minor, expected signs of gentle use. It’s a reliable and attractive choice for anyone looking for a quality ride that’s ready to go!
Poor condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is, recommended only for parts or a dedicated restoration project. The engine has a severe internal knock and multiple significant fluid leaks. The transmission is slipping badly, and the body shows signs of significant wear and corrosion. It is currently not roadworthy. Buyers should expect to tow the vehicle from its current location.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer, balancing refined performance with exceptional value. Meticulously maintained and subjected to a rigorous multi-point inspection, it offers a smooth, reliable driving experience and a sophisticated presence on the road. A distinguished choice for those who demand quality and long-term reliability without compromise.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s ready for your next adventure? I'm parting ways with my trusty car, and it’s honestly been such a joy to drive! It’s in solid shape, runs like a dream, and has been well-maintained over the years. Perfect for commuting or weekend getaways. I'd love to see it go to a great new home, so feel free to reach out with any questions!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 straight-six, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies and a crisp 8,000 RPM redline. Mated to a Getrag 6-speed manual, the drivetrain is robust, with the M-Variable differential providing excellent mechanical grip. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from a recently inspected rear subframe and refreshed bushings. While showing minor aesthetic patina consistent with its age, the Vanos system has been serviced and the rod bearings addressed, ensuring this high-revving powerhouse remains track-capable and street-refined.
Used car in good condition. Mechanically sound. Clean interior. Minimal exterior wear. Clean title.

This 2019 Audi A6 Premium Plus has been meticulously maintained and offers a perfect blend of luxury and performance. The Mythos Black Metallic exterior remains vibrant, accented by 19-inch alloy wheels and crisp LED lighting. Inside, you'll find a pristine Nougat Brown leather interior equipped with the Audi Virtual Cockpit, dual-zone climate control, and a panoramic sunroof. Mechanically, the 3.0L V6 engine runs flawlessly, supported by a full service history and recent preventative maintenance including new brake pads and a fresh oil service. While showing very minor signs of careful use, this vehicle drives as smoothly as the day it left the showroom. It is a reliable, sophisticated choice for anyone seeking a high-end driving experience without the new-car price tag.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and safety. Featuring a refined interior and a well-preserved exterior finish, this vehicle offers a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning owner. A premier selection for those seeking reliable performance and enduring value.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver, offering a refined balance of performance and long-term reliability. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable aesthetic and mechanical order, it has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our dealership's rigorous standards for roadworthiness. A sophisticated choice for those who prioritize quality engineering and a well-preserved driving experience.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my absolute favorite ride. It’s been so reliable and still looks fantastic on the road! I’ve taken really good care of it, so it’s ready for all your upcoming adventures. It drives like a dream and is just waiting for someone new to take the wheel. You're going to love it!

This E92 M3 showcases the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering with its S65 V8, delivering a linear power band up to an 8,400 RPM redline. The drivetrain features a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox and a variable M differential lock for optimal torque distribution. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement and throttle valve actuator service. The chassis is equipped with Electronic
Used car. Good condition. Runs well. Clean interior. Regular maintenance performed. No mechanical issues.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and serves as a reliable daily driver that still captures attention on the road. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish with only minor stone chips consistent with careful highway use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the upholstery remains firm and well-preserved, and all interior electronics—including the navigation system and dual-zone climate control—function flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in strong working order, having followed a strict preventative maintenance schedule with a recent full-service inspection, fresh fluids, and tires with plenty of tread remaining. It offers a smooth, quiet, and responsive driving experience with no mechanical concerns or dash warnings. This is a well-cared-for example that balances performance with everyday practicality. Full service history records are available for your review.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for reliability and performance. Featuring a documented service history, this automobile represents an exceptional value for the discerning driver who prioritizes both quality and longevity. Experience the confidence of a vehicle prepared for the road ahead.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, representing a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating a consistent history of professional care, this unit balances robust mechanical integrity with a sophisticated aesthetic presence. It serves as a testament to enduring quality and remains an exemplary selection within its class, offering both reliability and refined performance.

Hi everyone! 🚗 I'm parting ways with my reliable ride, and it's honestly in such great shape! It’s been super dependable for me, and I’ve made sure to keep it looking and running smoothly. It’s perfect if you’re looking for a solid car that’s ready to hit the road today. You’re going to love how it drives—feel free to reach out with any questions!

This E46 M3 is a mechanically sound example featuring the high-revving S54B32 inline-six, equipped with individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise Getrag 420G six-speed manual transmission and a variable M differential lock for optimal power distribution. Critical preventative maintenance has been addressed, including a reinforced rear subframe and a comprehensive VANOS system overhaul. The suspension maintains factory-spec geometry with refreshed bushings, ensuring the chassis remains communicative and sharp through the apex. This is a driver-focused machine with excellent compression across all cylinders and a clean, corrosion-free underside.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Reliable performance.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers the perfect balance of performance and comfort. The exterior features a deep, glossy finish with only minor road wear consistent with careful use. Inside, you'll find a smoke-free cabin with upholstery that shows minimal signs of aging, and all electronic features—including the premium infotainment system and dual-zone climate control—function flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly, backed by a comprehensive service history and a recent multi-point inspection. The tires have excellent tread remaining, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. Garage-kept and treated with genuine care, this car represents a reliable, turnkey opportunity for its next owner.

This exceptional vehicle presents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a synthesis of mechanical reliability and aesthetic refinement. Thoroughly inspected and maintained to rigorous standards, the automobile offers a consistent, high-tier driving experience and remains in commendable condition throughout. It represents a sophisticated choice for those who prioritize long-term durability and immediate prestige.

This expertly curated vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent maintenance and mechanical integrity, it offers a refined driving experience characterized by both reliability and poise. A distinguished choice for those seeking a high-caliber pre-owned asset that performs with distinction.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my reliable daily driver. It's in really solid shape and has been super well-maintained over the years. It drives smoothly and is ready for many more adventures with a new owner! I've absolutely loved this car, and I think you will too. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions!

This E46 M3 is a purist's example, featuring the iconic S54 inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox and a variable M differential lock for superior corner-exit traction. This unit has undergone critical preventative maintenance, including subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive VANOS overhaul. The suspension geometry remains true, complemented by refreshed bushings and a responsive rack-and-pinion steering setup. Mechanically robust and structurally sound, this M3 offers an unfiltered, analog driving experience for the discerning enthusiast.
Used car. Good condition. Well maintained. Clean title. Reliable engine. Minor interior wear.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between daily utility and refined luxury. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, with the bodywork showing only the minor, superficial stone chips expected from careful road use. Step inside to a cabin that has been treated with the utmost respect; the premium leather seating remains supple and free of tears, while the dashboard and trim components are in excellent shape. Every electronic feature, from the intuitive infotainment system to the multi-zone climate control, operates flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, benefiting from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule and recent fluid services. The transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a composed, rattle-free ride. Outfitted with tires that have significant tread remaining and a complete set of service records, this car is mechanically sound and aesthetically pleasing, representing a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking quality and value.

This vehicle represents a premier selection for the discerning driver, offering a harmonious balance of performance and reliability. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it features a robust powertrain and a refined interior designed for longevity. Every aspect of this automobile has been scrutinized to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity. This is an exceptional opportunity to acquire a high-caliber vehicle that delivers both prestige and enduring value.
